arts.ttl: Man City vs Inter: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Matchday 1 of the 2024/25 Champions League is arguably highlighted by Wednesday night's clash between Manchester City and Inter at the Etihad. Rodri is in line to make his first start of the season on Wednesday, while Phil Foden could come back into the side after failing to feature at the weekend.

arts.ttl: Inter Boss Simone Inzaghi Waxes Lyrical About His Man City Counterpart Pep Guardiola
arts.sum: Serie A champions Inter take a daunting-looking trip to the Etihad Stadium to face Manchester City in their opening Champions League fixture. Simone Inzaghi talked to the press in the build-up, naming his Citizens counterpart Pep Guardiola 'the best coach around.'
